title: Trump hits Canada with new 50% tariffs
shortDescription: President Trump took executive action to impose 50% tariffs on a wide range of imports from Canada.

title: Trump moves to limit student, journalist visas
shortDescription: Foreign students and journalists face new visa limits under a Trump administration rule set to take effect in September.

title: Unhappy Trump voters may stay home in the midterms
shortDescription: Frustrated Trump voters may not back Democrats, but lower turnout could still threaten Republican majorities in the midterms.

title: Troy Jackson likely to become U.S. Senate Democratic nominee in Maine
shortDescription: Troy Jackson looks all but certain to replace Graham Platner as the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate after a dominate weekend performance.

title: Mamdani calls AOC an ‘inspiration’ amid 2028 White House buzz
shortDescription: he congresswoman has caused speculation in recent months over whether or not she's interested in higher office. Here's what Mamdani said of AOC.

title: Trump updates from weekend include Barron, World Cup trophy ceremony
shortDescription: President Trump attended the World Cup final Sunday, and son Barron Trump was there. Iran war kills more troops. Air Force One will get some updates.

title: Trump presses Canadian on wildfires
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says Canadian wildfires have poisoned U.S. air, pressing Canadian officials to get the over 900 fires under control.

title: President Trump will visit Georgia high school this week. See details
shortDescription: President Donald Trump will be visiting an Atlanta-area high school on Wednesday as tight governor and Senate races continue in Georgia.

title: Trump says new Air Force One is being 'maxed out'
shortDescription: Just weeks after the new Qatar-gifted Air Force One made its first official flight, Trump said it will be sent for upgrades.

title: New Air Force One from Qatar will get 'maxed out' upgrades, Trump says
shortDescription: U.S. President Donald Trump said that the Qatari-donated jet that serves as an Air Force One plane will soon be sent away for upgrades.

title: Barron Trump photographed at World Cup in rare public appearance
shortDescription: Donald and Melania's only son Barron Trump attended the World Cup, but managed to avoid the cameras, almost. See the picture of him with Infantino.

title: Trump says Iran strikes to honor fallen soldiers
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said strikes on Iran were “in honor” of American soldiers killed in the Middle East over the weekend.

title: The 3 key Arizona congressional primaries to watch
shortDescription: These crucial congressional primary races in Arizona could provide clues about whether Republicans maintain their slim majority in the U.S. House.

title: Trump's Messi comments revive sports curse theory
shortDescription: Donald Trump's comments about Lionel Messi before Argentina's loss revived speculation about the president cursing teams. Here are some examples.

title: Can Lindsey Graham's Trump-endorsed sister fend off fellow GOP reps?
